decisions.title: Remove word usage governance
decisions.decision: Governance must preserve architecture, payment, privacy, and settlement invariants without regulating product vocabulary, copy terminology, or implementation naming.

decisions.title: Stripe settlement is manual-capture and provider-backed
decisions.decision: Use Stripe manual-capture PaymentIntents; retrieve current provider state before capture/cancel/void/refund; use idempotency keys for durable provider operations.

decisions.title: No route-level payment business logic
decisions.decision: Keep app route files thin; protected reads go through fetchers; writes go through server actions, transactions, and Stripe integration modules.

decisions.title: Old .agents reports and Stripe blueprints are stale
decisions.decision: Remove old reports, legal/Stripe notes, and scoped instruction files that conflict with the architecture-corrected source of truth.
